description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test that handles building, testing, and packaging a project on multiple platforms and environments. The workflow should trigger on push to master, develop, and tags matching v*, as well as on pull requests to any branch. It should include various jobs for different configurations, such as building and testing on Ubuntu 18.04 and 20.04, Alpine Linux, and Docker containers, and packaging for Debian and RPM-based systems.
